scripts.android:package: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Set-Location '.\apps\android'; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug; Copy-Item '.\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk' '.\Ad Free Podcast Player-debug.apk' -Force"
scripts.windows:run: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Process '.\apps\desktop\Ad Free Podcast Player-win32-x64\Ad Free Podcast Player.exe'"
